response.global_analysis:
1. Song Identification: Captured vocal tracks for 'Okochama Sensou', 'Lead Control', and 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy'.
2. Visual Exception Rule: Provided translation for 'Lead Control' title card.
3. Pronunciation & Disambiguation: Handled fast, overlapping arguments in 'Okochama Sensou' and ensured the visual lyrics written on-screen ('僕に向かって減らず口なんざ') corrected the web-scraped reference lyrics ('僕に向かって生意気な口なんざ').
4. Timing & Transitions: Ensured zero delay between continuous lyric blocks by setting the end times equal to the next start times where necessary. Used precise millisecond alignment.

subtitles.original: はーい はーい はい はい
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes, yes!

subtitles.original: 花丸よくできました☆
subtitles.english: Well done, good job☆

subtitles.original: あ゙ーむかつくぜ！まーぢむかつくぜ！
subtitles.english: Ah, it makes me mad! It really makes me mad!

subtitles.original: 僕に向かって減らず口なんざ
subtitles.english: Spouting backtalk like that to me!

subtitles.original: とっておきを君に見舞え
subtitles.english: I'll show you something special!

subtitles.original: 報復制裁 挑発しちゃって
subtitles.english: Retaliation, provocation, you've done it!

subtitles.original: 意地悪して一枚上
subtitles.english: Playing dirty, I'm one step ahead!

subtitles.original: チャンスは貰ってくスタンスで
subtitles.english: I'm taking the chance with this stance!

subtitles.original: 痛恨ミス あちゃっちゃー
subtitles.english: A fatal mistake, oops!

subtitles.original: おあいにく様だね 君の負け
subtitles.english: It's a pity, but it's your defeat!

subtitles.original: (イェス！)
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: だけど君 君だけが
subtitles.english: But you, only you...

subtitles.original: せいっ やぁっ とぉっ やぁっ うっ うっ やぁっ はっ
subtitles.english: Seiya! To, ya, u, u, ya, a, ha!

subtitles.original: 僕に似合いのライバル
subtitles.english: Are a rival suited for me!

subtitles.original: せいっ やぁっ とぉっ やぁっ うっ とぉっ やぁっ はっ
subtitles.english: Seiya! To, ya, u, to, ya, a, ha!

subtitles.original: 落ちるのも 凹んでるのも
subtitles.english: Falling down, feeling depressed...

subtitles.original: うっ はっ せいっ やぁっ やぁっ せいっ はっ
subtitles.english: U, ha, seiya! Ya, sei, ha!

subtitles.original: 調子狂わされるから
subtitles.english: Because you throw off my rhythm!

subtitles.original: 今宵もてめぇとやいやいやいやい
subtitles.english: Tonight, I'll argue with you again, yai yai yai!

subtitles.original: ハイ決定！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: And it's decided! Yay!

subtitles.original: あ゙ーむかつくぜ！まーぢむかつくぜ！
subtitles.english: Ah, it makes me mad! It really makes me mad!

subtitles.original: 憎まれ口もお口をチャック
subtitles.english: Shut your hateful mouth up!

subtitles.original: 閧の声ゴングを鳴らせ
subtitles.english: Sound the trumpet of war, ring the gong!

subtitles.original: 次世代エンペラーはこの俺だ
subtitles.english: The next-gen emperor is... this me!

subtitles.original: 悪戯して 悪ノリして
subtitles.english: Playing pranks, egging each other on!

subtitles.original: ほら ほら 煽ってくStyleで
subtitles.english: Look, look, with an escalating style!

subtitles.original: 一から百いただきます
subtitles.english: Taking everything from one to a hundred!

subtitles.original: 毎度ありがとうで 君のま…
subtitles.english: Thanks for your patronage, your de...

subtitles.original: まさかの引き分け？
subtitles.english: Wait, it's a draw?!

subtitles.original: えーっ？！
subtitles.english: Eh?!

subtitles.original: リードコントロール
subtitles.english: [Title: Lead Control]

subtitles.original: この頃 君が纏う 「躾直し」の季節の匂い
subtitles.english: The scent of the season of "re-education" you're wrapped in lately...

subtitles.original: 強かな佇まいの割に脆い ソコに触れるの
subtitles.english: Touching the fragile spot despite your tough exterior.

subtitles.original: あぁ 怒らないで darling！
subtitles.english: Ah, don't get angry, darling!

subtitles.original: だってホントのことだもん
subtitles.english: Because it's the truth, you see.

subtitles.original: 身体ばっかデカくなって 中身はガキだよね
subtitles.english: Your body's grown big, but inside you're just a kid.

subtitles.original: 暴れないで doggie！
subtitles.english: Don't rampage, doggie!

subtitles.original: 私 華奢な手だから
subtitles.english: Because my hands are delicate...

subtitles.original: リードなんて気まぐれで パッと落としちゃうかも
subtitles.english: My leash might just slip off on a whim.

subtitles.original: 「だらしない！ 意気地ない！ ホント君は救えない！
subtitles.english: So sloppy! No backbone! You're truly beyond saving!

subtitles.original: 堕落に耽っちゃって ご愁傷様
subtitles.english: Indulging in depravity, my condolences.

subtitles.original: 夢がない！ 糧もない！ くせに愛は欲しいの？
subtitles.english: No dreams! No sustenance! And yet you crave love?

subtitles.original: なら3回まわって お手から…」
subtitles.english: Then turn around three times and give me a paw..."

subtitles.original: (ワン)
subtitles.english: (Woof)

subtitles.original: よく聞いて darling
subtitles.english: Listen well, darling.

subtitles.original: 僻み妬み 人の企み この世は罠だらけ
subtitles.english: Jealousy, envy, people's schemes, this world is full of traps.

subtitles.original: ねえ ずっとここにいて？
subtitles.english: Hey, will you stay here forever?

subtitles.original: ひれ伏して doggie
subtitles.english: Bow down, doggie.
